presets.name: Wood Pluck
presets.description: Hollow triangle pair, short decay — soft mallet bouncing off a wooden bar.

presets.name: Saw Pluck
presets.description: Classic Plaits identity — saw stack at the octave, bright and percussive.

presets.name: Glass Bell
presets.description: FM sines stacked at oct+5th — crystalline ping with a tail.

presets.name: Clave
presets.description: Square pair, dark, very short — woodblock click for percussive lines.

presets.name: Kalimba
presets.description: Triangle pair at the octave — thumb piano character with quick decay.

presets.name: Soft EP
presets.description: Triangle pair, unison, mid bright, gentle decay — Rhodes-ish electric piano.

presets.name: Saw Keys
presets.description: Saw stack at the octave with mid decay — versatile keyboard sound.

presets.name: Pulse Stab
presets.description: Saw + square at a 5th — broad-spectrum harmonic stab with body.

presets.name: Marimba
presets.description: Triangle pair two octaves up, low morph — bright mallet articulation.

presets.name: FM Bell Roll
presets.description: FM sines at the octave — pitched bell tone that sustains into a chord wash.

presets.name: Saw Wash
presets.description: Saw stack at the octave with a long decay — sustained ambient pad.

presets.name: Hollow Pad
presets.description: Square pair at a 5th, soft cutoff — reedy hollow drone.

presets.name: Bell Pad
presets.description: FM sines at oct+5 with maximum decay — angelic shimmer that hangs forever.

presets.name: Dream Tri
presets.description: Triangle pair at the octave, soft, very long decay — dreamy washing pad.

presets.name: Ambient Drone
presets.description: Saw + square two octaves apart, dark, max decay — evolving low pad.

presets.name: Sub Bass
presets.description: Triangle pair, unison, dark — fundamental sub for low-end weight.

presets.name: Saw Bass
presets.description: Saw pair at unison, dark cutoff with a touch of resonance — meaty saw bass.

presets.name: Reese Tease
presets.description: Saw stack at a 5th with mid resonance — detune-y mid-saw bass nod.

presets.name: Square Bass
presets.description: Square pair at unison, hollow tone — old-school PWM-style bass.

presets.name: Pluck Bass
presets.description: Saw pair at the octave, short decay — staccato bass stabs with bite.

presets.name: Saw Lead
presets.description: Saw stack at a 5th, bright and resonant — singing solo voice.

presets.name: Reedy Lead
presets.description: Square pair, unison, bright — clarinet-ish hollow lead.

presets.name: FM Lead
presets.description: FM sines at the octave, very bright, morph toward osc 2 — synth flute character.

presets.name: Buzz Lead
presets.description: Saw + square at oct+5th — broad harmonic stack for a screaming lead.

presets.name: Resonant Zap
presets.description: Saw pair, very short decay, near-self-oscillating filter — sci-fi zap.

presets.name: Squeal
presets.description: Square pair at oct+5, bright with high resonance — feedback-style squeal.

presets.name: Wood Block
presets.description: Triangle pair, near-instant decay, very low morph — percussion hit.

presets.name: Sci-Fi Drop
presets.description: FM sines two octaves apart, resonant pluck — laser-drop bleep.
